title: Dialogue Policy Tool API Design
prompt:
Design a dialogue policy engine for a customer service AI that handles refund requests. The engine must support: intent classification, entity extraction, policy rule matching, escalation triggers, and multi-turn context tracking.

Propose the tool API surface (function signatures, input/output schemas). Explain the policy evaluation order, conflict resolution strategy, and how the system handles ambiguous or edge-case requests. Consider audit trail requirements.
